title: How to Perform Competitor Analysis: A Step-by-Step Guide
snippet: Learn what competitor analysis is and how to conduct an effective one. This guide provides a structured framework for evaluating your industry's competitive landscape, competitors' business structures, marketing efforts, and customer journeys.

title: How To Do Competitive Analysis (6-Step Framework and Template)
snippet: Why Conduct a Competitive Analysis? While customers drive your success, competitors shape your opportunities. A competitive analysis is a structured evaluation of competing businesses to uncover their strategies, strengths, weaknesses, and market positioning. It answers critical questions to refine your decisions and avoid costly missteps:

title: Product Manager's Power Move: Competitor Analysis
snippet: Master product manager competitive analysis by following these straightforward steps and helpful tips. Plus, download a free product comparison template.

title: How to Conduct a Winning Competitive Product Analysis | Maze
snippet: Competitive product analysis is a product research method that studies competitors, the industry, and target audiences. The goal of competitive product analysis is to use the data to improve your product, prices, or positioning, and ultimately get ahead of competitors.

title: How to Conduct In-Depth Competitor Product Analysis
snippet: By conducting a comprehensive analysis of your competitor's products, you can gain valuable insights into their features, pricing, positioning, customer satisfaction, and overall performance. This information allows you to identify market gaps and opportunities, refine your own product strategy, and ultimately outperform your competitors.
